scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run --filter k9s-dashboard-backend dev" "bun run --filter k9s-dashboard-frontend dev"
scripts.desktop:prebuild: bun run --filter k9s-dashboard-frontend build && bun run sidecar:build
scripts.desktop:dev: bun run sidecar:build && concurrently -k -n backend,desktop "PORT=3140 bun run dev:backend" "bun run --filter k9s-dashboard-desktop dev"
